bodyHtml:
fast is making waves in the Backend ecosystem this week, gaining 31new stars. With a total of 169 stars on GitHub and 7 forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 169Stars
📈 +31/wkGrowth
🔀 7Forks
⚠️ 2Open Issues

Key Features

  • Written in Go for maximum performance
  • Licensed under MIT — free to use and modify

Why fast Is Trending

The Backend landscape is constantly evolving, and fast has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 31 new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: Internet speed test in your terminal

If you're working in Backend, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Quick Start

Get started with fast in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/maaslalani/fast # Navigate to project cd fast # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

fast is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
